MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES-RICH BECKAM SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR STEVEN MARQUEZ JAK, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFFS FRANK SICCO AND PIERRE SICCO (WIFE) PRESENT. DEFENDANT IN PRO PER NICOLE CRNJANSKI PRESENT. JPT-IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK-PARAM NATT; CSR-CHRISTINA PAXTON.

CASE SETTLED PER WRITTEN STIPULATION AND JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION; TERMS ARE AS FOLLOWS:- JUDGEMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFFS AND AGAINST DEFT. FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 3208A-OCTAVIO ST.,SF, CA. DEFT $2650 IN BACK RENT PLUS $1400 DAMAGES AND ADDITIONAL SUM OF $2500 TOTAL MONEY JUDGMENT IS FOR $6550. DEFT TO VACATES PREMISES BY 7/10/04 ON OR BEFORE 4PM AND RETURN KEYS TO PLTFS ATTYS OFFICE OR DESIGNATED AGENTS. IF DEFT. SURRENDERS PRIOR TO JULY 10,2004, PLAINTIFF AGREES TO SET ASIDE THE MONEY JUDGMENT. DEFT TO LEAVE THE PREMISES IN CLEAN CONDITION. THEIR WILL BE NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION. ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES IS DEEMED ABANDONDED AND PLTF TO DISPOSE AS PER CC 1980-91.
